title: Municipalities
lead: The ==74th CA== promised empowered urban self-government — but ‘functions without finances’ persists: ==municipal revenues are just 1% of GDP== (vs 5–6% in Brazil/South Africa).

items.title: Issues
bullets: ==DPCs/MPCs defunct or never formed== in most states
Only ==14 states== held regular municipal elections in the last 5 years
Political and administrative resistance sharper in cities
Functions exercised through ==parastatals and parallel bodies==

items.title: Solutions
bullets: ==Constitutional accountability audits==
Use ==City Finance Rankings== and Smart Cities evaluations for compliance checks

items.title: Issues
bullets: ==Fragmented responsibilities== — Jal Boards report to states, not ULBs
Authority diluted by ==Smart City SPVs==, AMRUT etc.
Tier-II/III backlogs in waste, housing, water — underfunding + overlapping jurisdictions
==45%+ of ULBs miss service-level benchmarks== in water and waste

items.title: Solutions & Cases
bullets: Operationalise the ==18 Twelfth-Schedule functions== via exclusive activity maps
==Municipal Services Cadre== with urban planners and engineers
==Indore==: six consecutive Swachh Survekshan wins — door-to-door collection, bio-CNG

items.title: Issues
bullets: High dependence on ==tied central/state grants==
==Municipal bonds legal but rare== — only 11 cities
==Post-GST loss of local taxes== cut fiscal autonomy
Property tax recovery ==0.2% of GDP== vs 1–2.5% globally

items.title: Solutions & Cases
bullets: ==GIS-linked property records== and digital tax platforms
Institutional ==credit ratings + pooled bonds== for Tier-2/3 cities
==Pune & Ahmedabad==: municipal bonds funding infrastructure without aid delays

items.title: Issues
bullets: ==Understaffing & deputation model== weakens city management
==No trained town planners== — planning outsourced to consultants
Audit delays; weak compliance culture
No citizen audit or participatory budgeting in most cities; ==commissioner-led model== limits elected councils

items.title: Solutions & Cases
bullets: Hands-on training: procurement, finance, ==GIS, e-governance== (NIUA, IIPA, AMRUT modules)
Skill-milestone incentives in the ==City Finance Index==
==Ward Sabhas with statutory powers==; mandatory online disclosure of budgets, resolutions, social audits
==Surat & Pune==: real-time digital reporting · ==Odisha Urban Academy==: e-learning + site visits

blocks.text: If India is to become truly self-governing, its Panchayats and Municipalities must be more than administrative shells — they must become engines of transformative change.
